RichText.Text: 1. take preferences and needs into account 2. bring the family together to connect 3. My carrots are not evenly sized. 4. push me aside to take over the task 5. closely monitor all the ads 6. by contrast in contrast to 7. market unhealthy food to kids kid-focused marketing strategies 8. consistently ask their parents to purchase be consistent with the evidence consist of five players consist /lie in... 9. launch an initiative 10. a voluntary effort to police itself 11. exposure to ads aimed at kids be exposed to ads targeted to kids 12. be targeted to kids target/aim/goal/purpose/objective n.

TextRun.Text: 11. 接触到面向儿童的广告；
接触到面向儿童的广告

RichText.Text: 1. 把喜好与需求考虑在内 2. 让家人相聚、增进交流 3. 我的胡萝卜不是均匀地切大小。 4. 把我推到一边，接手/接管这项工作 5. 严密监控/监管所有广告 6. 相比之下; 与...相比 7. 向儿童推销不健康食品；（v.） 针对儿童的营销的策略 8. 不断地/持续地央求父母购买； 与证据相符/相一致； 由五名队员组成； 在于/存在于 9. 发起一项倡议 10. 自发的/自愿的开展自我监管行动 11. 接触到面向儿童的广告； 接触到面向儿童的广告 12. 面向儿童； 目标、意图、目的、宗旨
